subject.description: A very tired, authentic marketing manager under heavy budget pressure.
subject.action: Staring directly into the camera lens with a heavy sigh, reflecting the reality of running a small team with no enterprise budget.

composition.framing: Centered close-up. MUST follow cropping rules: cut above eyebrows, always give the chin ample breathing room, no boxing the chin, never cut in flesh.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Extremely low depth of field. Only the eyes and central facial expression are in sharp focus.

lighting.type: Single dim light source, casting stark shadows on the face.
lighting.color_grading: Dark, raw, authentic skin texture with visible fatigue and stress.

aesthetic_style: RAW photo, authentic unretouched photography, shot on 35mm film, hyper realistic photorealism, actual human beings. DO NOT MAKE IT A CARTOON OR DIGITAL ART.
negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear: text, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, smooth skin filters, cut off chins, weird framing, digital art, illustration, vector art, cartoon, 3D render, CGI.
